description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house surrounded by a white fence and dense greenery, including trees and shrubs along the perimeter. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of gray and white exterior walls, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front yard includes a driveway with two parked cars and a pedestrian walkway leading to the main entrance. In the backyard, there is a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and additional outdoor seating areas, providing ample space for recreation and relaxation. The property is well-landscaped, with trees providing privacy and shade, and the overall layout is spacious and open. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, and multiple access points visible from different sides.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a pool, deck, and driveway. Surrounded by trees and greenery, it has a sleek, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway with two cars, and a clear view of the fence and trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat roof, upper and lower stories, and the backyard pool and deck area, with trees providing privacy.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the backyard with a wooden deck, pool, and dense tree coverage along the fence, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the driveway, pool, and the arrangement of trees and fence, with the house's modern lines and window placements visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, small steps, and is framed by trees and a paved walkway, with no porch or columns.
